sentences.target: Je casse la pointe de mon crayon.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kas la pwɛ̃t də mɔ̃ kʁɛjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je casse la pointe de mon crayon.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kas la pwɛ̃t də mɔ̃ kʁɛjɔ̃/
translations.en: I'm breaking the tip of my pencil.
translations.es: Se me rompe la punta del lápiz.
translations.de: Mir bricht die Spitze meines Bleistifts ab.
translations.it: Mi si rompe la punta della matita.
translations.pt: A ponta do meu lápis quebrou.
translations.vi: Ngòi bút chì của tôi bị gãy.
translations.ar: انكسرت سن قلم الرصاص الخاص بي.
translations.nl: De punt van mijn potlood is afgebroken.
translations.hi: मेरी पेंसिल की नोंक टूट गई.
translations.el: Μου έσπασε η μύτη του μολυβιού.
translations.sv: Spetsen på min blyertspenna gick av.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the agent of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object noun 'pointe' as specific.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'casse', meaning the tip/point.
Preposition introducing a genitive/possessive complement ('de mon crayon') specifying whose tip.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'crayon' to indicate ownership.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the prepositional complement 'de mon crayon'.

sentences.target: Fais attention à la pointe du couteau.
sentences.reading: /fɛ atɑ̃sjɔ̃ a la pwɛ̃t dy kuto/

translations.fr: Fais attention à la pointe du couteau.
translations.ipa: /fɛ atɑ̃sjɔ̃ a la pwɛ̃t dy kuto/
translations.en: Watch out for the knife tip.
translations.es: Ten cuidado con la punta del cuchillo.
translations.it: Fai attenzione alla punta del coltello.
translations.pt: Cuidado com a ponta da faca.
translations.nl: Pas op voor de punt van het mes.
translations.hi: चाकू की नोक से सावधान रहें.
translations.cs: Dej si pozor na špičku nože.
translations.ja: 包丁の先に気をつけて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; light-verb used in the fixed expression 'faire attention' (to be careful).
Common noun, feminine; object of 'faire' in the expression 'faire attention'.
Preposition; introduces the thing one must be careful about ('la pointe du couteau').
Definite article, feminine singular; determines the noun 'pointe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à', referring to the tip.
Contraction of preposition 'de' + definite article 'le'; links 'pointe' to the noun 'couteau' ('of the knife').
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'du', specifying which tip.

sentences.target: On évite les heures de pointe ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ evit lez‿œʁ də pwɛ̃t sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: On évite les heures de pointe ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ evit lez‿œʁ də pwɛ̃t sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: We're avoiding rush hour this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana evitamos las horas punta.
translations.de: Wir meiden heute Morgen die Stoßzeiten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天早上避开高峰时段。
translations.yue: 我哋今朝避開繁忙時段。
translations.ru: Мы сегодня утром избегаем часа пик.
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã evitamos o horário de pico.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi tránh giờ cao điểm.
translations.ar: نحن نتجنب ساعات الذروة هذا الصباح.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці ми уникаємо годин пік.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हम भीड़भाड़ के समय से बच रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αποφεύγουμε τις ώρες αιχμής σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig unngår vi rushtiden.
translations.id: Pagi ini kami menghindari jam sibuk.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen undviker vi rusningstrafiken.
translations.ro: În această dimineață evităm orele de vârf.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno se vyhýbáme dopravní špičce.
translations.da: Her til morgen undgår vi myldretiden.
translations.ja: 今朝はラッシュの時間帯を避けます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun often meaning 'we'; takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); expresses the action.
Definite article, plural; determines 'heures' as a specific set.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'évite'.
Preposition; links 'heures' to the complement 'pointe' forming the compound 'heures de pointe' (rush hours).
Common noun used as a noun complement in the fixed expression 'heures de pointe', meaning peak/rush.
Demonstrative determiner; specifies the time expression 'matin' as 'this morning'.
Common noun, masculine; forms a temporal adverbial NP ('ce matin').

sentences.target: La tarte a une pointe de cannelle.
sentences.reading: /la taʁt a yn pwɛ̃t də kanɛl/

translations.fr: La tarte a une pointe de cannelle.
translations.ipa: /la taʁt a yn pwɛ̃t də kanɛl/
translations.en: The pie has a hint of cinnamon.
translations.es: La tarta tiene un toque de canela.
translations.de: Der Kuchen hat einen Hauch von Zimt.
translations.it: La torta ha un tocco di cannella.
translations.ru: В пироге есть лёгкий оттенок корицы.
translations.pt: A torta tem um toque de canela.
translations.tr: Tartta hafif bir tarçın aroması var.
translations.vi: Bánh có một chút hương quế.
translations.nl: De taart heeft een vleugje kaneel.
translations.uk: У пирозі є легка нотка кориці.
translations.hu: A pitében van egy leheletnyi fahéj.
translations.hi: पाई में दालचीनी का हल्का सा स्वाद है.
translations.el: Η τάρτα έχει μια νότα κανέλας.
translations.nb: Paien har et hint av kanel.
translations.id: Pai ini punya sedikit aroma kayu manis.
translations.ro: Tarta are o notă de scorțișoară.
translations.da: Tærten har et strejf af kanel.
translations.ja: パイにはほんのりシナモンの風味がある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'tarte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses possession.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'pointe' as non-specific quantity.
Common noun, feminine singular; here a measure/quantity meaning a small amount ('a hint').
Preposition introducing the content/measure complement ('de cannelle').
Common noun, feminine; complement of 'de' specifying the substance of the 'pointe'.
